tools.name: weather_get
tools.description: Get the current weather conditions, temperature, humidity, and wind for a given city or geographic location.

tools.name: weather_forecast
tools.description: Get a multi-day weather forecast for a city, including high/low temperatures and precipitation chance.

tools.name: stocks_quote
tools.description: Look up the current stock price, day change, and volume for a public company by ticker symbol.

tools.name: stocks_history
tools.description: Retrieve historical daily stock prices for a ticker across a date range.

tools.name: news_search
tools.description: Search recent news articles and headlines matching a query, ranked by recency and relevance.

tools.name: news_headlines
tools.description: Get top headlines for a given country or category (business, tech, sports, etc).

tools.name: calendar_add_event
tools.description: Create a new calendar event with a title, start time, end time, and optional attendees.

tools.name: calendar_list
tools.description: List upcoming calendar events within a date range.

tools.name: email_send
tools.description: Send an email message to one or more recipients with a subject and body.

tools.name: email_search
tools.description: Search the user's inbox for messages matching a query (sender, subject, body).

tools.name: maps_directions
tools.description: Get turn-by-turn driving, walking, or transit directions between two locations.

tools.name: maps_search_places
tools.description: Search nearby places (restaurants, gas stations, hotels) around a location.

tools.name: translate_text
tools.description: Translate a piece of text from one language to another.

tools.name: currency_convert
tools.description: Convert an amount between two currencies at the current exchange rate.

tools.name: wiki_search
tools.description: Search Wikipedia and return article summaries for a query.

tools.name: image_generate
tools.description: Generate an image from a text prompt using a diffusion model.

tools.name: code_run_python
tools.description: Execute a Python code snippet in a sandbox and return stdout, stderr, and any return value.

tools.name: code_lint
tools.description: Run a static linter against a code snippet and return diagnostics.

tools.name: files_read
tools.description: Read the contents of a file from local disk.

tools.name: files_write
tools.description: Write contents to a file on local disk, creating or overwriting it.

tools.name: db_query
tools.description: Run a read-only SQL query against the production analytics database.

tools.name: github_create_issue
tools.description: Open a new issue on a GitHub repository with a title and body.

tools.name: github_list_prs
tools.description: List open pull requests on a GitHub repository.

tools.name: slack_post_message
tools.description: Post a message to a Slack channel.

tools.name: slack_search
tools.description: Search the Slack workspace for messages matching a query.

tools.name: music_play
tools.description: Play a song, album, or playlist on the connected music service.

tools.name: timer_set
tools.description: Set a countdown timer for a given duration.

tools.name: notes_add
tools.description: Append a note to the user's note collection.

tools.name: task_create
tools.description: Create a new task or todo item with a description and optional due date.

tools.name: task_complete
tools.description: Mark an existing task as completed.

messages.content: And any recent news about them?

turns.expectedQuery: search recent news articles by query

Will it rain in LA when I get there?

turns.expectedQuery: multi-day weather forecast for a city precipitation
